zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Nichols於1668年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登時，她的父親James N. Nichols31歲，母親Mary Ann Felt29歲。她於1694年與Andrew James Cunningham在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1726年9月9日之前在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 倫敦格洛托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Nichols于1668年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登时，她的父亲James N. Nichols31岁，母亲Mary Ann Felt29岁。她于1694年与Andrew James Cunningham在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1726年9月9日之前在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 倫敦格洛托。

nameMeanings.name: Nichols
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Nichol , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s. In North America, this surname has absorbed various cognates from other languages, e.g. Croatian and Serbian Nikolić (see Nikolic ); see also below.
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Nicholls
meanings: English and Dutch: variant of   Nichols  .

variants.name: Nichol
meanings: Scottish and northern English: from the Middle English personal name Nic(h)ol(e), a vernacular form of Nic(h)olas (see Nicholas ). Compare Nickel and Nicol .

In some cases also an American shortened and altered form of Greek Nikolas , its variant Nicolas , or of any of various derivatives of the personal name Nikola(o)s ‘Nicholas’, including Nikolis (see Nicoli ). Compare Nicholas and Nicol .

variants.name: Nicols
meanings: English, Scottish, and Dutch: variant of   Nichols  . This surname is rare in the Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Nichols was born in 1668, in Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, her father, James N. Nichols, was 31 and her mother, Mary Ann Felt, was 29. She married Andrew James Cunningham in 1694, in Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. She died before 9 September 1726, in Groton, New London, Connecticut, United States.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Nichols è nata il nel 1668 nel Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, James N. Nichols, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Mary Ann Felt, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Andrew James Cunningham nel 1694, nel Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie. Morì prima del 9 settembre 1726, nel Groton, New London, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Nicholsが1668年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスマルデンで生まれた時，父James N. Nicholsは31歳，母Mary Ann Feltは29歳であった。1694年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州でAndrew James Cunninghamと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1726年9月9日以前にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ロンドングロトンで死去した。

ko.Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 맬든

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Nichols(이)가 1668년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 맬든에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James N. Nichols(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Ann Felt(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1694년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주에서 Andrew James Cunningham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1726년 9월 9일 이전 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 런던 그로턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Nichols nasceu em 1668, em Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, seu pai, James N. Nichols, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Mary Ann Felt, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Andrew James Cunningham em 1694, em Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu antes 9 de setembro de 1726, em Groton, New London, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Nichols родилась в 1668 г. в местности малден, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени James N. Nichols было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Mary Ann Felt, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Andrew James Cunningham в 1694 г. в местности Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла перед 9 сентябрь 1726 г. в местности гротон, ню лондон, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Nichols nació en 1668, en Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, James N. Nichols, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Mary Ann Felt, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Andrew James Cunningham en 1694, en Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió antes de 9 de septiembre de 1726, en Groton, New London, Connecticut, Estados Unidos.
